Projects.title: NeuroDecode
desc: NeuroDecode is an AI-powered developer tool designed to bridge the gap between visual system design and executable code. It allows users to upload a neural network architecture diagram and automatically translates it into structured Markdown analysis and raw, deployable PyTorch code.

The project combines a Next.js frontend with a FastAPI backend and a CrewAI multi-agent workflow powered by Gemini 1.5 Flash. It was production-hardened by moving the backend to Hugging Face Spaces, fixing file uploads for read-only environments, and offloading blocking agent execution so the server stays responsive.

Projects.title: Paradize.space
desc: A futuristic coming-soon landing page centered on the idea of turning spare compute into one shared brain.
It combines atmospheric visuals, a newsletter-style waitlist form, and a sharp product-storytelling layout for a polished startup feel.

Projects.title: BrandForTip website
desc: A responsive React-based website created for BrandForTip with a polished, modern presentation.
It was a freelance project made for a lawfirm, it combines React.js, EmailJS, TailwindCSS, and Framer Motion for a smooth and animated experience.

Projects.title: Old Portfolio
desc: My earlier portfolio site built as a simple personal showcase for my skills, projects, and contact details.
It uses a lightweight visual style and a straightforward layout to present the content clearly across devices.

Projects.title: ForAutomate website
desc: My first client work, a responsive React-based website for a consultancy startup.
The site was designed and developed with React.js and includes resources generated using Veo.

Projects.title: Binance Futures Testnet Trading Bot CLI
desc: A lightweight, strictly validated CLI tool for placing and managing Binance Futures Testnet orders with production-style defensive behavior.

Built with Typer, Rich, Pydantic, and python-binance, it validates user input locally, handles API/network failures gracefully, logs all request/response activity with Loguru, includes mocked Pytest coverage, and provides a Gemini-powered natural language trading command for AI agent workflows.

Projects.title: Multilingual Online Radicalization Detection
desc: AI-powered system for detecting and classifying online radicalization content across multiple languages.
Built for Smart.AI hackathon, this multilingual model covers Arabic, English, Hinglish, and Urdu using RNN-LSTM, Trie-based keyword filtering, and a Streamlit dashboard for real-time analysis.

Projects.title: GDG Campus Design Work
desc: A collection of design work created for the Google Developer Club on campus at Dronacharya College of Engineering.
These visuals were produced during my term as the Design and PR Lead, covering event creatives, branding assets, and community communication design.

Projects.title: ML Based Inventory Management
desc: This project demonstrates a machine learning pipeline for demand prediction and inventory management.
It focuses on inventory optimization by predicting future demand (units sold) with feature engineering, one-hot encoding, and a RandomForestRegressor-based regression workflow.

Projects.title: Volume Control Using Hand Gestures
desc: This project allows you to control your system volume using hand gestures detected via your webcam.
It uses OpenCV, MediaPipe, and Pycaw for hand tracking and volume control with real-time visual feedback on the camera feed.

Projects.title: ATS Resume Classifier
desc: This tool allows HR professionals and job seekers to quickly analyze resumes against specific job descriptions for various tech roles.
It uses Google's Generative AI to evaluate resume fit, provide feedback, and calculate a keyword-based ATS match percentage through a simple Streamlit interface.

Projects.title: MCP Server Model Twitter
desc: This project demonstrates a simple client-server application using the Model Context Protocol with Google Gemini AI and Twitter API integration.
It exposes an SSE endpoint and tools for basic arithmetic plus AI-generated post creation for X/Twitter automation.

Projects.title: Minimlistic Portfolio
desc: My old portfolio showcasing my skills in web development and information about me.
It was built with only HTML, CSS, and Javascript, and hosted as a simple personal site.

Projects.title: Space Themed Portfolio
desc: A modern, animated 3D developer portfolio built with React, Three.js, TailwindCSS, and motion effects.
Features include 3D visuals, smooth transitions, scroll-based animations, a responsive layout, and a working contact form.

Projects.title: Amatic Portfolio
desc: A bold personal portfolio with a minimal monochrome layout, oversized typography, and a cinematic landing experience.
The design focuses on clean navigation, smooth section transitions, and a strong visual hierarchy for an elegant developer profile.

Projects.title: Anubhav Mobile App UI/UX
desc: A UI/UX design project for a mobile app that lets users buy collectible items featured at the Mahakumbh Mela.
Created for a hackathon, the concept focuses on a clean shopping flow, cultural storytelling, and an engaging mobile-first experience.
